name: Irresistible Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine peanut butter, Crisco, brown sugar, milk and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add egg; beat just until blended. Combine flour, salt and baking soda. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed. Stir until just combined. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheet. Flatten slightly in a crisscross pattern with tines of a fork. Bake for 7-8 minutes or until set and just beginning to brown. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely. Makes 3 dozen.
